data.title: SSL/TLS Encryption
data.description: Ensures all data transmitted between users and the website is encrypted.

data.title: Content Security Policy
data.description: Reduces the risk of cross-site scripting attacks by controlling resource loading.

data.title: Regular Vulnerability Scanning
data.description: Frequent checking for vulnerabilities to protect against new threats.

data.title: Two-Factor Authentication
data.description: Adds an extra layer of security for user account protection.
data.technical_spec: 2FA configured via SMS or dedicated authentication apps.

data.title: Web Application Firewall
data.description: Defends against common web threats and some zero-day vulnerabilities.
